channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [TEGA] MM Business Trust Acquires 9.69% Stake in Tega Industries Limited from Promoter Manish Mohanka
item.description:
MM Business Trust, a member of the Promoter Group, has acquired 72,78,925 equity shares of Tega Industries Limited, representing 9.69% of the total paid-up capital, from Promoter Manish Mohanka. This acquisition was made through an off-market transfer on March 23, 2026, in terms of the exemption granted by SEBI. The aggregate holding of the Promoter and Promoter group category remains the same before and after the transfer, without any change in control and management of Tega Industries Limited.

  • MM Business Trust acquires 9.69% stake in Tega Industries Limited from Promoter Manish Mohanka.
  • The acquisition was made through an off-market transfer on March 23, 2026.
  • The acquisition is in terms of the exemption granted by SEBI.
  • The aggregate holding of the Promoter and Promoter group category remains the same.
  • No change in control and management of Tega Industries Limited.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Tega Industries Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [SMARTWORKS] Smartworks Coworking Spaces Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window
item.description:
Smartworks Coworking Spaces Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The closure will be effective from Wednesday, April 01, 2026, and will reopen after 48 hours from the announcement of the Audited (Standalone and Consolidated) Financial Results for the quarter and year ended on March 31, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting to consider these results has not been announced yet. Designated Persons and their immediate relatives are advised not to deal in the Equity Shares of the Company during this period.

  • Smartworks Coworking Spaces Ltd announces closure of trading window
  • Closure effective from April 01, 2026
  • Reopening after 48 hours from announcement of Audited Financial Results
  • Board Meeting date for financial results announcement yet to be announced
  • Designated Persons and their immediate relatives advised not to deal in Company's Equity Shares during this period

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Smartworks Coworking Spaces Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [WISEC] Wisec Global Ltd Closes Trading Window for Q1 and FY Ending on 31st March 2026
item.description:
Wisec Global Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives, effective from 1st April, 2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ending on 31st March, 2026. This closure is in compliance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the Code of Conduct for Regulating, Monitoring and Reporting Trading by Designated Persons and Immediate Relatives of Designated Persons. Additionally, the PAN of designated persons will be frozen by the Designated Depository, National Securities Depository Limited (NSDL) from 1st April, 2026 till 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results.

  • Trading window closure for designated persons and their immediate relatives from 1st April, 2026
  • Closure lasts until 48 hours after the declaration of audited financial results for Q1 and FY 2025-2026
  • Compliance with Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Freezing of PAN for designated persons by NSDL from 1st April, 2026 till 48 hours after financial results declaration
  • Closure and PAN freeze in accordance with the Company's Code of Conduct

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Wisec Global Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [BALGOPAL] Sandeep Jindal Acquires 14,00,000 Shares in Balgopal Commercial Ltd via Warrant Conversion
item.description:
Sandeep Jindal, a promoter of Balgopal Commercial Ltd, has acquired 14,00,000 equity shares of the company. The acquisition was made pursuant to the conversion of warrants allotted on a preferential basis. This disclosure was made in compliance with Regulation 29(2) of the SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011. The total voting rights of Sandeep Jindal and Vijay Yadav before the acquisition were 45.43% and 36.73% respectively, which has now increased to 50.39% and 44.81% respectively after the acquisition.

  • Sandeep Jindal acquires 14,00,000 shares in Balgopal Commercial Ltd
  • Acquisition made pursuant to the conversion of warrants allotted on a preferential basis
  • Total voting rights of Sandeep Jindal and Vijay Yadav before the acquisition were 45.43% and 36.73% respectively
  • Total voting rights of Sandeep Jindal and Vijay Yadav after the acquisition are 50.39% and 44.81% respectively

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Balgopal Commercial Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [CHAMBLFERT] CM Airtime Promotion LLP Acquires 90,000 Shares of Chambal Fertilisers & Chemicals Ltd
item.description:
CM Airtime Promotion LLP has purchased 90,000 equity shares of Chambal Fertilisers and Chemicals Ltd on 23-Mar-26, thereby increasing their aggregate shareholding to 2134180 equity shares. This disclosure was made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

  • CM Airtime Promotion LLP purchased 90,000 equity shares of Chambal Fertilisers and Chemicals Ltd.
  • The aggregate shareholding of CM Airtime Promotion LLP in Chambal Fertilisers & Chemicals Ltd. has increased to 2134180 equity shares.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CHAMBAL FERTILISERS & CHEMICALS LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [BPL] BPL Ltd Closes Trading Window Ahead of Audited Financial Results Release
item.description:
BPL Ltd, in compliance with SEBI regulations and the company's internal procedures, has announced the closure of the trading window for all insiders, including designated persons and their immediate relatives. The closure will be effective from 1st April, 2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ending 31st March, 2026. The date of the board meeting for the consideration and declaration of the audited financial results will be announced later.

  • BPL Ltd closes trading window in compliance with SEBI regulations
  • Closure effective from 1st April, 2026
  • Trading window to reopen 48 hours after audited financial results declaration
  • Board meeting date for results declaration to be announced later
  • Trading window closure applies to all insiders, designated persons, and their immediate relatives

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BPL LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [BALGOPAL] Promoter Vijay Laltaprasad Yadav Acquires 5,00,000 Shares in Balgopal Commercial Ltd via Warrant Conversion
item.description:
Vijay Laltaprasad Yadav, a promoter of Balgopal Commercial Ltd, has acquired 5,00,000 equity shares of the company. The acquisition was made pursuant to the conversion of warrants allotted on a preferential basis. The total equity shares of the company post-acquisition stand at 2,09,10,000 shares of Rs 10 each, amounting to a total equity share capital of Rs 20,91,00,000. The total voting capital of the company after the acquisition is also updated to reflect the changes.

  • Vijay Laltaprasad Yadav, a promoter of Balgopal Commercial Ltd, has acquired 5,00,000 equity shares of the company.
  • The acquisition was made pursuant to the conversion of warrants allotted on a preferential basis.
  • The total equity shares of the company post-acquisition stand at 2,09,10,000 shares of Rs 10 each.
  • The total equity share capital of the company after the acquisition is Rs 20,91,00,000.
  • The total voting capital of the company has been updated to reflect the changes post-acquisition.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Balgopal Commercial Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [INDONG] Promoter Hariram Garg of Indong Tea Company Ltd Sells 0.08% Shares via Open Market
item.description:
According to a disclosure by Indong Tea Company Ltd, Mr. Hariram Garg, a promoter of the company, sold 16,000 equity shares (0.08%) through an open market transaction on March 20, 2026. This sale represents 0.08% of the total share capital of the company. The company's total share capital and voting rights remain unchanged at Rs. 19,42,10,480 post this transaction.

  • Hariram Garg, a promoter of Indong Tea Company Ltd, sold 16,000 equity shares (0.08%) through an open market transaction.
  • The transaction took place on March 20, 2026.
  • The sale represents 0.08% of the total share capital of the company.
  • The total share capital and voting rights of the company remain unchanged at Rs. 19,42,10,480 post this transaction.
  • The company's equity shares are listed on BSE Limited.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Indong Tea Company Ltd | Category: Sale

item.title: [JINDRILL] Jindal Drilling & Industries Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window
item.description:
Jindal Drilling & Industries Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives, in compliance with the company's Internal Code of Conduct and SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations. The closure will be effective from 1st April, 2026 and will open 48 hours after the declaration of audited financial results for the quarter and year ended on 31st March, 2026. The date of the board meeting for the declaration of audited financial results will be intimated in due course.

  • Jindal Drilling & Industries Ltd announces closure of trading window
  • Trading window to close for designated persons and their immediate relatives
  • Closure effective from 1st April, 2026
  • Trading window to open 48 hours after declaration of audited financial results
  • Date of board meeting for declaration of audited financial results to be intimated later

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JINDAL DRILLING & INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [THACKER] Thacker & Company Ltd Closes Trading Window Until After Q4, 2026 Financial Results
item.description:
Thacker & Company Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for all Directors, Officers, Designated Persons, Connected Persons, and their immediate relatives. The closure will be in effect from 1st April, 2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of financial results for the quarter and year ending on 31st March, 2026. This decision comes in accordance with the company's Insider Trading Policy.

  • Thacker & Company Ltd closes trading window from 1st April, 2026
  • Trading window to remain closed until 48 hours after Q4, 2026 financial results
  • Applies to Directors, Officers, Designated Persons, Connected Persons, and their immediate relatives
  • In line with the company's Insider Trading Policy
  • Announcement aims to prevent insider trading during the financial results declaration period

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: THACKER & CO.LTD. | Category: Business Update
